pages.text: To be able to apply a pattern to an armor you need to unlock it first.$(br)The way you unlock a pattern varies per pattern.

pages.title: Mechanical
pages.text: Unlock:$(br)To unlock the mechanical pattern you have to obtain an arc reactor.$(br2)Note:$(br)The helmets have a faceplate you can open/close by right-clicking the item in the inventory.

pages.entity: myneheroes:stationary_armor{ArmorItems: [{components: {"myneheroes:colors": [I; -6854105, -1, -12471809, -9707931], "myneheroes:is_dyed": [B; 0B, 1B, 1B, 1B]}, count: 1, id: "myneheroes:mark3_gold_titanium_boots"}, {components: {"myneheroes:colors": [I; -6854105, -1, -12471809, -9707931], "myneheroes:is_dyed": [B; 0B, 1B, 1B, 1B]}, count: 1, id: "myneheroes:mark3_gold_titanium_leggings"}, {components: {"myneheroes:colors": [I; -6854105, -1, -12471809, -9707931], "myneheroes:is_dyed": [B; 0B, 1B, 1B, 1B]}, count: 1, id: "myneheroes:mark3_gold_titanium_chestplate"}, {components: {"myneheroes:colors": [I; -6854105, -1, -12471809, -9707931], "myneheroes:opening_time": 15, "myneheroes:is_dyed": [B; 0B, 1B, 1B, 1B]}, count: 1, id: "myneheroes:mark3_gold_titanium_helmet"}], NoBasePlate: 1b}

pages.title: Speedster
pages.text: Unlock:$(br)To unlock the speedster pattern you have to become a $(l:myneheroes:power_speedster)speedster$(/l).
